name: Vermont Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the spinach into bite-sized pieces.
2. Arrange the pieces in a salad bowl.
3. Add the sliced onion and diced celery to the bowl.
4. Chill until ready to serve.
5. Toss the spinach mixture with olive oil until the leaves are well coated.
6. In a separate small bowl, combine vinegar, salt, garlic, pepper, and monosodium glutamate.
7. Pour the dressing over the spinach mixture.
8. Add the diced hard-cooked eggs (if using).
9. Toss everything together to ensure it's well mixed.
10. Serve immediately.
